77\u2192import joptsimple.ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec;\n    78\u2192import joptsimple.OptionSpec;\n    79\u2192import joptsimple.OptionSpecBuilder;\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192public abstract class TopicCommand {\n    82\u2192    private static final Logger LOG = LoggerFactory.getLogger(TopicCommand.class);\n    83\u2192\n    84\u2192    public static void main(String... args) {\n    85\u2192        Exit.exit(mainNoExit(args));\n    86\u2192    }\n    87\u2192\n    88\u2192    private static int mainNoExit(String... args) {\n    89\u2192        try {\n    90\u2192            execute(args);\n    91\u2192            return 0;\n    92\u2192        } catch (Throwable e) {\n    93\u2192            System.err.println(e.getMessage());\n    94\u2192            System.err.println(Utils.stackTrace(e));\n    95\u2192            return 1;\n    96\u2192        }\n    97\u2192    }\n    98\u2192\n    99\u2192    static void execute(String... args) throws Exception {\n   100\u2192        TopicCommandOptions opts = new TopicCommandOptions(args);\n   101\u2192        TopicService topicService = new TopicService(opts.commandConfig(), opts.bootstrapServer());\n   102\u2192        int exitCode = 0;\n   103\u2192        try {\n   104\u2192            if (opts.hasCreateOption()) {\n   105\u2192                topicService.createTopic(opts);\n   106\u2192            } else if (opts.hasAlterOption()) {\n   107\u2192                topicService.alterTopic(opts);\n   108\u2192            } else if (opts.hasListOption()) {\n   109\u2192                topicService.listTopics(opts);\n   110\u2192            } else if (opts.hasDescribeOption()) {\n   111\u2192                topicService.describeTopic(opts);\n   112\u2192            } else if (opts.hasDeleteOption()) {\n   113\u2192                topicService.deleteTopic(opts);\n   114\u2192            }\n   115\u2192        } catch (ExecutionException e) {\n   116\u2192            Throwable cause = e.getCause();\n   117\u2192            if (cause != null) {\n   118\u2192                printException(cause);\n   119\u2192            } else {\n   120\u2192                printException(e);\n   121\u2192            }\n   122\u2192            exitCode = 1;\n   123\u2192        } catch (Throwable e) {\n   124\u2192            printException(e);\n   125\u2192            exitCode = 1;\n   126\u2192        } finally {\n   127\u2192            topicService.close();\n   128\u2192            Exit.exit(exitCode);\n   129\u2192        }\n   130\u2192    }\n   131\u2192\n   132\u2192    private static void printException(Throwable e) {\n   133\u2192        System.out.println(\"Error while executing topic command : \" + e.getMessage());\n   134\u2192        LOG.error(Utils.stackTrace(e));\n   135\u2192    }\n   136\u2192\n   137\u2192    static Map<Integer, List<Integer>> parseReplicaAssignment(String replicaAssignmentList) {\n   138\u2192        String[] partitionList = replicaAssignmentList.split(\",\");\n   139\u2192        Map<Integer, List<Integer>> ret = new LinkedHashMap<>();\n   140\u2192        for (int i = 0; i < partitionList.length; i++) {\n   141\u2192            List<Integer> brokerList = Arrays.stream(partitionList[i].split(\":\"))\n   142\u2192                .map(String::trim)\n   143\u2192                .mapToInt(Integer::parseInt)\n   144\u2192                .boxed()\n   145\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   146\u2192            Collection<Integer> duplicateBrokers = ToolsUtils.duplicates(brokerList);\n   147\u2192            if (!duplicateBrokers.isEmpty()) {\n   148\u2192                throw new AdminCommandFailedException(\"Partition replica lists may not contain duplicate entries: \" +\n   149\u2192                    duplicateBrokers.stream()\n   150\u2192                        .map(Object::toString)\n   151\u2192                        .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\"))\n   152\u2192                );\n   153\u2192            }\n   154\u2192            ret.put(i, brokerList);\n   155\u2192            if (ret.get(i).size() != ret.get(0).size()) {\n   156\u2192                throw new AdminOperationException(\"Partition \" + i + \" has different replication factor: \" + brokerList);\n   157\u2192            }\n   158\u2192        }\n   159\u2192        return ret;\n   160\u2192    }\n   161\u2192\n   162\u2192    @SuppressWarnings(\"deprecation\")\n   163\u2192    private static Properties parseTopicConfigsToBeAdded(TopicCommandOptions opts) {\n   164\u2192        List<List<String>> configsToBeAdded = opts.topicConfig().orElse(Collections.emptyList())\n   165\u2192            .stream()\n   166\u2192            .map(s -> Arrays.asList(s.split(\"\\\\s*=\\\\s*\")))\n   167\u2192            .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   168\u2192\n   169\u2192        if (!configsToBeAdded.stream().allMatch(config -> config.size() == 2)) {\n   170\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"requirement failed: Invalid topic config: all configs to be added must be in the format \\\"key=val\\\".\");\n   171\u2192        }\n   172\u2192\n   173\u2192        Properties props = new Properties();\n   174\u2192        configsToBeAdded.stream()\n   175\u2192            .forEach(pair -> props.setProperty(pair.get(0).trim(), pair.get(1).trim()));\n   176\u2192        LogConfig.validate(props);\n   177\u2192        if (props.containsKey(TopicConfig.MESSAGE_FORMAT_VERSION_CONFIG)) {\n   178\u2192            System.out.println(\"WARNING: The configuration ${TopicConfig.MESSAGE_FORMAT_VERSION_CONFIG}=${props.getProperty(TopicConfig.MESSAGE_FORMAT_VERSION_CONFIG)} is specified. \" +\n   179\u2192                \"This configuration will be ignored if the version is newer than the inter.broker.protocol.version specified in the broker or \" +\n   180\u2192                \"if the inter.broker.protocol.version is 3.0 or newer. This configuration is deprecated and it will be removed in Apache Kafka 4.0.\");\n   181\u2192        }\n   182\u2192        return props;\n   183\u2192    }\n   184\u2192\n   185\u2192    // It is possible for a reassignment to complete between the time we have fetched its state and the time\n   186\u2192    // we fetch partition metadata. In this case, we ignore the reassignment when determining replication factor.\n   187\u2192    public static boolean isReassignmentInProgress(TopicPartitionInfo tpi, PartitionReassignment ra) {\n   188\u2192        // Reassignment is still in progress as long as the removing and adding replicas are still present\n   189\u2192        Set<Integer> allReplicaIds = tpi.replicas().stream().map(Node::id).collect(Collectors.toSet());\n   190\u2192        Set<Integer> changingReplicaIds = new HashSet<>();\n   191\u2192        if (ra != null) {\n   192\u2192            changingReplicaIds.addAll(ra.removingReplicas());\n   193\u2192            changingReplicaIds.addAll(ra.addingReplicas());\n   194\u2192        }\n   195\u2192        return allReplicaIds.stream().anyMatch(changingReplicaIds::contains);\n   196\u2192\n   197\u2192    }\n   198\u2192\n   199\u2192    private static Integer getReplicationFactor(TopicPartitionInfo tpi, PartitionReassignment reassignment) {\n   200\u2192        return isReassignmentInProgress(tpi, reassignment) ?\n   201\u2192            reassignment.replicas().size() - reassignment.addingReplicas().size() :\n   202\u2192            tpi.replicas().size();\n   203\u2192    }\n   204\u2192\n   205\u2192    /**\n   206\u2192     * ensures topic existence and throws exception if topic doesn't exist\n   207\u2192     *\n   208\u2192     * @param foundTopics        Topics that were found to match the requested topic name.\n   209\u2192     * @param requestedTopic     Name of the topic that was requested.\n   210\u2192     * @param requireTopicExists Indicates if the topic needs to exist for the operation to be successful.\n   211\u2192     *                           If set to true, the command will throw an exception if the topic with the\n   212\u2192     *                           requested name does not exist.\n   213\u2192     */\n   214\u2192    private static void ensureTopicExists(List<String> foundTopics, Optional<String> requestedTopic, Boolean requireTopicExists) {\n   215\u2192        // If no topic name was mentioned, do not need to throw exception.\n   216\u2192        if (requestedTopic.isPresent() && !requestedTopic.get().isEmpty() && requireTopicExists && foundTopics.isEmpty()) {\n   217\u2192            // If given topic doesn't exist then throw exception\n   218\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format(\"Topic '%s' does not exist as expected\", requestedTopic));\n   219\u2192        }\n   220\u2192    }\n   221\u2192\n   222\u2192    private static List<String> doGetTopics(List<String> allTopics, Optional<String> topicIncludeList, Boolean excludeInternalTopics) {\n   223\u2192        if (topicIncludeList.isPresent()) {\n   224\u2192            IncludeList topicsFilter = new IncludeList(topicIncludeList.get());\n   225\u2192            return allTopics.stream()\n   226\u2192                .filter(topic -> topicsFilter.isTopicAllowed(topic, excludeInternalTopics))\n   227\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   228\u2192        } else {\n   229\u2192            return allTopics.stream()\n   230\u2192                .filter(topic -> !(Topic.isInternal(topic) && excludeInternalTopics))\n   231\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   232\u2192        }\n   233\u2192    }\n   234\u2192\n   235\u2192    /**\n   236\u2192     * ensures topic existence and throws exception if topic doesn't exist\n   237\u2192     *\n   238\u2192     * @param foundTopicIds        Topics that were found to match the requested topic id.\n   239\u2192     * @param requestedTopicId     Id of the topic that was requested.\n   240\u2192     * @param requireTopicIdExists Indicates if the topic needs to exist for the operation to be successful.\n   241\u2192     *                             If set to true, the command will throw an exception if the topic with the\n   242\u2192     *                             requested id does not exist.\n   243\u2192     */\n   244\u2192    private static void ensureTopicIdExists(List<Uuid> foundTopicIds, Uuid requestedTopicId, Boolean requireTopicIdExists) {\n   245\u2192        // If no topic id was mentioned, do not need to throw exception.\n   246\u2192        if (requestedTopicId != null && requireTopicIdExists && foundTopicIds.isEmpty()) {\n   247\u2192            // If given topicId doesn't exist then throw exception\n   248\u2192            throw new IllegalArgumentException(String.format(\"TopicId '%s' does not exist as expected\", requestedTopicId));\n   249\u2192        }\n   250\u2192    }\n   251\u2192\n   252\u2192    static class CommandTopicPartition {\n   253\u2192        private final String name;\n   254\u2192        private final Optional<Integer> partitions;\n   255\u2192        private final Optional<Integer> replicationFactor;\n   256\u2192        private final Map<Integer, List<Integer>> replicaAssignment;\n   257\u2192        private final Properties configsToAdd;\n   258\u2192\n   259\u2192        private final TopicCommandOptions opts;\n   260\u2192\n   261\u2192        public CommandTopicPartition(TopicCommandOptions options) {\n   262\u2192            opts = options;\n   263\u2192            name = options.topic().get();\n   264\u2192            partitions = options.partitions();\n   265\u2192            replicationFactor = options.replicationFactor();\n   266\u2192            replicaAssignment = options.replicaAssignment().orElse(Collections.emptyMap());\n   267\u2192            configsToAdd = parseTopicConfigsToBeAdded(options);\n   268\u2192        }\n   269\u2192\n   270\u2192        public Boolean hasReplicaAssignment() {\n   271\u2192            return !replicaAssignment.isEmpty();\n   272\u2192        }\n   273\u2192\n   274\u2192        public Boolean ifTopicDoesntExist() {\n   275\u2192            return opts.ifNotExists();\n   276\u2192        }\n   277\u2192    }\n   278\u2192\n   279\u2192    static class TopicDescription {\n   280\u2192        private final String topic;\n   281\u2192        private final Uuid topicId;\n   282\u2192        private final Integer numPartitions;\n   283\u2192        private final Integer replicationFactor;\n   284\u2192        private final Config config;\n   285\u2192        private final Boolean markedForDeletion;\n   286\u2192\n   287\u2192        public TopicDescription(String topic, Uuid topicId, Integer numPartitions, Integer replicationFactor, Config config, Boolean markedForDeletion) {\n   288\u2192            this.topic = topic;\n   289\u2192            this.topicId = topicId;\n   290\u2192            this.numPartitions = numPartitions;\n   291\u2192            this.replicationFactor = replicationFactor;\n   292\u2192            this.config = config;\n   293\u2192            this.markedForDeletion = markedForDeletion;\n   294\u2192        }\n   295\u2192\n   296\u2192        public void printDescription() {\n   297\u2192            String configsAsString = config.entries().stream()\n   298\u2192                .filter(config -> !config.isDefault())\n   299\u2192                .map(ce -> ce.name() + \"=\" + ce.value())\n   300\u2192                .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\"));\n   301\u2192            System.out.print(\"Topic: \" +  topic);\n   302\u2192            if (!topicId.equals(Uuid.ZERO_UUID))\n   303\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tTopicId: \" + topicId);\n   304\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tPartitionCount: \" + numPartitions);\n   305\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tReplicationFactor: \" + replicationFactor);\n   306\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tConfigs: \" + configsAsString);\n   307\u2192            System.out.print(markedForDeletion ? \"\\tMarkedForDeletion: true\" : \"\");\n   308\u2192            System.out.println();\n   309\u2192        }\n   310\u2192    }\n   311\u2192\n   312\u2192    static class PartitionDescription {\n   313\u2192        private final String topic;\n   314\u2192        private final TopicPartitionInfo info;\n   315\u2192        private final Config config;\n   316\u2192        private final Boolean markedForDeletion;\n   317\u2192        private final PartitionReassignment reassignment;\n   318\u2192\n   319\u2192        PartitionDescription(String topic,\n   320\u2192                             TopicPartitionInfo info,\n   321\u2192                             Config config,\n   322\u2192                             Boolean markedForDeletion,\n   323\u2192                             PartitionReassignment reassignment) {\n   324\u2192            this.topic = topic;\n   325\u2192            this.info = info;\n   326\u2192            this.config = config;\n   327\u2192            this.markedForDeletion = markedForDeletion;\n   328\u2192            this.reassignment = reassignment;\n   329\u2192        }\n   330\u2192\n   331\u2192        public Integer minIsrCount() {\n   332\u2192            return Integer.parseInt(config.get(TopicConfig.MIN_IN_SYNC_REPLICAS_CONFIG).value());\n   333\u2192        }\n   334\u2192\n   335\u2192        public Boolean isUnderReplicated() {\n   336\u2192            return getReplicationFactor(info, reassignment) - info.isr().size() > 0;\n   337\u2192        }\n   338\u2192\n   339\u2192        public boolean hasLeader() {\n   340\u2192            return info.leader() != null;\n   341\u2192        }\n   342\u2192\n   343\u2192        public Boolean isUnderMinIsr() {\n   344\u2192            return !hasLeader() ||  info.isr().size() < minIsrCount();\n   345\u2192        }\n   346\u2192\n   347\u2192        public Boolean isAtMinIsrPartitions() {\n   348\u2192            return minIsrCount() == info.isr().size();\n   349\u2192        }\n   350\u2192\n   351\u2192        public Boolean hasUnavailablePartitions(Set<Integer> liveBrokers) {\n   352\u2192            return !hasLeader() || !liveBrokers.contains(info.leader().id());\n   353\u2192        }\n   354\u2192\n   355\u2192        public void printDescription() {\n   356\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tTopic: \" + topic);\n   357\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tPartition: \" + info.partition());\n   358\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tLeader: \" + (hasLeader() ? info.leader().id() : \"none\"));\n   359\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tReplicas: \" + info.replicas().stream()\n   360\u2192                .map(node -> Integer.toString(node.id()))\n   361\u2192                .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   362\u2192            System.out.print(\"\\tIsr: \" + info.isr().stream()\n   363\u2192                .map(node -> Integer.toString(node.id()))\n   364\u2192                .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   365\u2192            if (reassignment != null) {\n   366\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tAdding Replicas: \" + reassignment.addingReplicas().stream()\n   367\u2192                    .map(node -> node.toString())\n   368\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   369\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tRemoving Replicas: \" + reassignment.removingReplicas().stream()\n   370\u2192                    .map(node -> node.toString())\n   371\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   372\u2192            }\n   373\u2192\n   374\u2192            if (info.elr() != null) {\n   375\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tElr: \" + info.elr().stream()\n   376\u2192                    .map(node -> Integer.toString(node.id()))\n   377\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   378\u2192            } else {\n   379\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tElr: N/A\");\n   380\u2192            }\n   381\u2192\n   382\u2192            if (info.lastKnownElr() != null) {\n   383\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tLastKnownElr: \" + info.lastKnownElr().stream()\n   384\u2192                    .map(node -> Integer.toString(node.id()))\n   385\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.joining(\",\")));\n   386\u2192            } else {\n   387\u2192                System.out.print(\"\\tLastKnownElr: N/A\");\n   388\u2192            }\n   389\u2192            System.out.print(markedForDeletion ? \"\\tMarkedForDeletion: true\" : \"\");\n   390\u2192            System.out.println();\n   391\u2192        }\n   392\u2192    }\n   393\u2192\n   394\u2192    static class DescribeOptions {\n   395\u2192        private final TopicCommandOptions opts;\n   396\u2192        private final Set<Integer> liveBrokers;\n   397\u2192        private final boolean describeConfigs;\n   398\u2192        private final boolean describePartitions;\n   399\u2192\n   400\u2192        public DescribeOptions(TopicCommandOptions opts, Set<Integer> liveBrokers) {\n   401\u2192            this.opts = opts;\n   402\u2192            this.liveBrokers = liveBrokers;\n   403\u2192            this.describeConfigs = !opts.reportUnavailablePartitions() &&\n   404\u2192                !opts.reportUnderReplicatedPartitions() &&\n   405\u2192                !opts.reportUnderMinIsrPartitions() &&\n   406\u2192                !opts.reportAtMinIsrPartitions();\n   407\u2192            this.describePartitions = !opts.reportOverriddenConfigs();\n   408\u2192        }\n   409\u2192\n   410\u2192        private boolean shouldPrintUnderReplicatedPartitions(PartitionDescription partitionDescription) {\n   411\u2192            return opts.reportUnderReplicatedPartitions() && partitionDescription.isUnderReplicated();\n   412\u2192        }\n   413\u2192\n   414\u2192        private boolean shouldPrintUnavailablePartitions(PartitionDescription partitionDescription) {\n   415\u2192            return opts.reportUnavailablePartitions() && partitionDescription.hasUnavailablePartitions(liveBrokers);\n   416\u2192        }\n   417\u2192\n   418\u2192        private boolean shouldPrintUnderMinIsrPartitions(PartitionDescription partitionDescription) {\n   419\u2192            return opts.reportUnderMinIsrPartitions() && partitionDescription.isUnderMinIsr();\n   420\u2192        }\n   421\u2192\n   422\u2192        private boolean shouldPrintAtMinIsrPartitions(PartitionDescription partitionDescription) {\n   423\u2192            return opts.reportAtMinIsrPartitions() && partitionDescription.isAtMinIsrPartitions();\n   424\u2192        }\n   425\u2192\n   426\u2192        private boolean shouldPrintTopicPartition(PartitionDescription partitionDesc) {\n   427\u2192            return describeConfigs ||\n   428\u2192                shouldPrintUnderReplicatedPartitions(partitionDesc) ||\n   429\u2192                shouldPrintUnavailablePartitions(partitionDesc) ||\n   430\u2192                shouldPrintUnderMinIsrPartitions(partitionDesc) ||\n   431\u2192                shouldPrintAtMinIsrPartitions(partitionDesc);\n   432\u2192        }\n   433\u2192\n   434\u2192        public void maybePrintPartitionDescription(PartitionDescription desc) {\n   435\u2192            if (shouldPrintTopicPartition(desc)) {\n   436\u2192                desc.printDescription();\n   437\u2192            }\n   438\u2192        }\n   439\u2192    }\n   440\u2192\n   441\u2192    public static class TopicService implements AutoCloseable {\n   442\u2192        private final Admin adminClient;\n   443\u2192\n   444\u2192        public TopicService(Properties commandConfig, Optional<String> bootstrapServer) {\n   445\u2192            this.adminClient = createAdminClient(commandConfig, bootstrapServer);\n   446\u2192        }\n   447\u2192\n   448\u2192        public TopicService(Admin admin) {\n   449\u2192            this.adminClient = admin;\n   450\u2192        }\n   451\u2192\n   452\u2192        private static Admin createAdminClient(Properties commandConfig, Optional<String> bootstrapServer) {\n   453\u2192            if (bootstrapServer.isPresent()) {\n   454\u2192                commandConfig.put(AdminClientConfig.BOOTSTRAP_SERVERS_CONFIG, bootstrapServer.get());\n   455\u2192            }\n   456\u2192            return Admin.create(commandConfig);\n   457\u2192        }\n   458\u2192\n   459\u2192        public void createTopic(TopicCommandOptions opts) throws Exception {\n   460\u2192            CommandTopicPartition topic = new CommandTopicPartition(opts);\n   461\u2192            if (Topic.hasCollisionChars(topic.name)) {\n   462\u2192                System.out.println(\"WARNING: Due to limitations in metric names, topics with a period ('.') or underscore ('_') could \" +\n   463\u2192                    \"collide. To avoid issues it is best to use either, but not both.\");\n   464\u2192            }\n   465\u2192            createTopic(topic);\n   466\u2192        }\n   467\u2192\n   468\u2192        public void createTopic(CommandTopicPartition topic) throws Exception {\n   469\u2192            if (topic.replicationFactor.filter(rf -> rf > Short.MAX_VALUE || rf < 1).isPresent()) {\n   470\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The replication factor must be between 1 and \" + Short.MAX_VALUE + \" inclusive\");\n   471\u2192            }\n   472\u2192            if (topic.partitions.filter(p -> p < 1).isPresent()) {\n   473\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"The partitions must be greater than 0\");\n   474\u2192            }\n   475\u2192\n   476\u2192            try {\n   477\u2192                NewTopic newTopic;\n   478\u2192                if (topic.hasReplicaAssignment()) {\n   479\u2192                    newTopic = new NewTopic(topic.name, topic.replicaAssignment);\n   480\u2192                } else {\n   481\u2192                    newTopic = new NewTopic(topic.name, topic.partitions, topic.replicationFactor.map(Integer::shortValue));\n   482\u2192                }\n   483\u2192\n   484\u2192                Map<String, String> configsMap = topic.configsToAdd.stringPropertyNames().stream()\n   485\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.toMap(name -> name, name -> topic.configsToAdd.getProperty(name)));\n   486\u2192\n   487\u2192                newTopic.configs(configsMap);\n   488\u2192                CreateTopicsResult createResult = adminClient.createTopics(Collections.singleton(newTopic),\n   489\u2192                    new CreateTopicsOptions().retryOnQuotaViolation(false));\n   490\u2192                createResult.all().get();\n   491\u2192                System.out.println(\"Created topic \" + topic.name + \".\");\n   492\u2192            } catch (ExecutionException e) {\n   493\u2192                if (e.getCause() == null) {\n   494\u2192                    throw e;\n   495\u2192                }\n   496\u2192                if (!(e.getCause() instanceof TopicExistsException && topic.ifTopicDoesntExist())) {\n   497\u2192                    throw (Exception) e.getCause();\n   498\u2192                }\n   499\u2192            }\n   500\u2192        }\n   501\u2192\n   502\u2192        public void listTopics(TopicCommandOptions opts) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   503\u2192            String results = getTopics(opts.topic(), opts.excludeInternalTopics())\n   504\u2192                .stream()\n   505\u2192                .collect(Collectors.joining(\"\\n\"));\n   506\u2192            System.out.println(results);\n   507\u2192        }\n   508\u2192\n   509\u2192        public void alterTopic(TopicCommandOptions opts) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   510\u2192            CommandTopicPartition topic = new CommandTopicPartition(opts);\n   511\u2192            List<String> topics = getTopics(opts.topic(), opts.excludeInternalTopics());\n   512\u2192            ensureTopicExists(topics, opts.topic(), !opts.ifExists());\n   513\u2192\n   514\u2192            if (!topics.isEmpty()) {\n   515\u2192                Map<String, KafkaFuture<org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription>> topicsInfo = adminClient.describeTopics(topics).topicNameValues();\n   516\u2192                Map<String, NewPartitions> newPartitions = topics.stream()\n   517\u2192                    .map(topicName -> topicNewPartitions(topic, topicsInfo, topicName))\n   518\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.toMap(Map.Entry::getKey, Map.Entry::getValue));\n   519\u2192                adminClient.createPartitions(newPartitions, new CreatePartitionsOptions().retryOnQuotaViolation(false)).all().get();\n   520\u2192            }\n   521\u2192        }\n   522\u2192\n   523\u2192        private AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<String, NewPartitions> topicNewPartitions(\n   524\u2192            CommandTopicPartition topic,\n   525\u2192            Map<String, KafkaFuture<org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription>> topicsInfo,\n   526\u2192            String topicName) {\n   527\u2192            if (topic.hasReplicaAssignment()) {\n   528\u2192                try {\n   529\u2192                    Integer startPartitionId = topicsInfo.get(topicName).get().partitions().size();\n   530\u2192                    Map<Integer, List<Integer>> replicaMap = topic.replicaAssignment.entrySet().stream()\n   531\u2192                        .skip(startPartitionId)\n   532\u2192                        .collect(Collectors.toMap(Map.Entry::getKey, Map.Entry::getValue));\n   533\u2192                    List<List<Integer>> newAssignment = new ArrayList<>(replicaMap.values());\n   534\u2192                    return new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(topicName, NewPartitions.increaseTo(topic.partitions.get(), newAssignment));\n   535\u2192                } catch (InterruptedException | ExecutionException e) {\n   536\u2192                    throw new RuntimeException(e);\n   537\u2192                }\n   538\u2192            }\n   539\u2192            return new AbstractMap.SimpleEntry<>(topicName, NewPartitions.increaseTo(topic.partitions.get()));\n   540\u2192        }\n   541\u2192\n   542\u2192        public Map<TopicPartition, PartitionReassignment> listAllReassignments(Set<TopicPartition> topicPartitions) {\n   543\u2192            try {\n   544\u2192                return adminClient.listPartitionReassignments(topicPartitions).reassignments().get();\n   545\u2192            } catch (ExecutionException e) {\n   546\u2192                Throwable cause = e.getCause();\n   547\u2192                if (cause instanceof UnsupportedVersionException || cause instanceof ClusterAuthorizationException) {\n   548\u2192                    LOG.debug(\"Couldn't query reassignments through the AdminClient API: \" + cause.getMessage(), cause);\n   549\u2192                    return Collections.emptyMap();\n   550\u2192                } else {\n   551\u2192                    throw new RuntimeException(e);\n   552\u2192                }\n   553\u2192            } catch (InterruptedException e) {\n   554\u2192                throw new RuntimeException(e);\n   555\u2192            }\n   556\u2192        }\n   557\u2192\n   558\u2192        public void describeTopic(TopicCommandOptions opts) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   559\u2192            // If topicId is provided and not zero, will use topicId regardless of topic name\n   560\u2192            Optional<Uuid> inputTopicId = opts.topicId()\n   561\u2192                .map(Uuid::fromString).filter(uuid -> !uuid.equals(Uuid.ZERO_UUID));\n   562\u2192            Boolean useTopicId = inputTopicId.isPresent();\n   563\u2192\n   564\u2192            List<Uuid> topicIds;\n   565\u2192            List<String> topics;\n   566\u2192            if (useTopicId) {\n   567\u2192                topicIds = getTopicIds(inputTopicId.get(), opts.excludeInternalTopics());\n   568\u2192                topics = Collections.emptyList();\n   569\u2192            } else {\n   570\u2192                topicIds = Collections.emptyList();\n   571\u2192                topics = getTopics(opts.topic(), opts.excludeInternalTopics());\n   572\u2192            }\n   573\u2192\n   574\u2192            // Only check topic name when topicId is not provided\n   575\u2192            if (useTopicId) {\n   576\u2192                ensureTopicIdExists(topicIds, inputTopicId.get(), !opts.ifExists());\n   577\u2192            } else {\n   578\u2192                ensureTopicExists(topics, opts.topic(), !opts.ifExists());\n   579\u2192            }\n   580\u2192            List<org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription> topicDescriptions = new ArrayList<>();\n   581\u2192\n   582\u2192            if (!topicIds.isEmpty()) {\n   583\u2192                Map<Uuid, org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription> descTopics =\n   584\u2192                    adminClient.describeTopics(TopicCollection.ofTopicIds(topicIds)).allTopicIds().get();\n   585\u2192                topicDescriptions = new ArrayList<>(descTopics.values());\n   586\u2192            }\n   587\u2192\n   588\u2192            if (!topics.isEmpty()) {\n   589\u2192                Map<String, org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription> descTopics =\n   590\u2192                    adminClient.describeTopics(TopicCollection.ofTopicNames(topics),\n   591\u2192                        new DescribeTopicsOptions()\n   592\u2192                            .partitionSizeLimitPerResponse(opts.partitionSizeLimitPerResponse().orElse(2000))).allTopicNames().get();\n   593\u2192                topicDescriptions = new ArrayList<>(descTopics.values());\n   594\u2192            }\n   595\u2192\n   596\u2192            List<String> topicNames = topicDescriptions.stream()\n   597\u2192                .map(org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription::name)\n   598\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   599\u2192            Map<ConfigResource, KafkaFuture<Config>> allConfigs = adminClient.describeConfigs(\n   600\u2192                topicNames.stream()\n   601\u2192                    .map(name -> new ConfigResource(ConfigResource.Type.TOPIC, name))\n   602\u2192                    .collect(Collectors.toList())\n   603\u2192            ).values();\n   604\u2192            List<Integer> liveBrokers = adminClient.describeCluster().nodes().get().stream()\n   605\u2192                .map(Node::id)\n   606\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   607\u2192            DescribeOptions describeOptions = new DescribeOptions(opts, new HashSet<>(liveBrokers));\n   608\u2192            Set<TopicPartition> topicPartitions = topicDescriptions\n   609\u2192                .stream()\n   610\u2192                .flatMap(td -> td.partitions().stream()\n   611\u2192                    .map(p -> new TopicPartition(td.name(), p.partition())))\n   612\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toSet());\n   613\u2192            Map<TopicPartition, PartitionReassignment> reassignments = listAllReassignments(topicPartitions);\n   614\u2192            for (org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription td : topicDescriptions) {\n   615\u2192                String topicName = td.name();\n   616\u2192                Uuid topicId = td.topicId();\n   617\u2192                Config config = allConfigs.get(new ConfigResource(ConfigResource.Type.TOPIC, topicName)).get();\n   618\u2192                ArrayList<TopicPartitionInfo> sortedPartitions = new ArrayList<>(td.partitions());\n   619\u2192                sortedPartitions.sort(Comparator.comparingInt(TopicPartitionInfo::partition));\n   620\u2192                printDescribeConfig(opts, describeOptions, reassignments, td, topicName, topicId, config, sortedPartitions);\n   621\u2192                printPartitionDescription(describeOptions, reassignments, td, topicName, config, sortedPartitions);\n   622\u2192            }\n   623\u2192        }\n   624\u2192\n   625\u2192        private void printPartitionDescription(DescribeOptions describeOptions, Map<TopicPartition, PartitionReassignment> reassignments, org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription td, String topicName, Config config, ArrayList<TopicPartitionInfo> sortedPartitions) {\n   626\u2192            if (describeOptions.describePartitions) {\n   627\u2192                for (TopicPartitionInfo partition : sortedPartitions) {\n   628\u2192                    PartitionReassignment reassignment =\n   629\u2192                        reassignments.get(new TopicPartition(td.name(), partition.partition()));\n   630\u2192                    PartitionDescription partitionDesc = new PartitionDescription(topicName,\n   631\u2192                        partition, config, false, reassignment);\n   632\u2192                    describeOptions.maybePrintPartitionDescription(partitionDesc);\n   633\u2192                }\n   634\u2192            }\n   635\u2192        }\n   636\u2192\n   637\u2192        private void printDescribeConfig(TopicCommandOptions opts, DescribeOptions describeOptions, Map<TopicPartition, PartitionReassignment> reassignments, org.apache.kafka.clients.admin.TopicDescription td, String topicName, Uuid topicId, Config config, ArrayList<TopicPartitionInfo> sortedPartitions) {\n   638\u2192            if (describeOptions.describeConfigs) {\n   639\u2192                List<ConfigEntry> entries = new ArrayList<>(config.entries());\n   640\u2192                boolean hasNonDefault = entries.stream().anyMatch(e -> !e.isDefault());\n   641\u2192                if (!opts.reportOverriddenConfigs() || hasNonDefault) {\n   642\u2192                    int numPartitions = td.partitions().size();\n   643\u2192                    TopicPartitionInfo firstPartition = sortedPartitions.get(0);\n   644\u2192                    PartitionReassignment reassignment =\n   645\u2192                        reassignments.get(new TopicPartition(td.name(), firstPartition.partition()));\n   646\u2192                    TopicDescription topicDesc = new TopicDescription(topicName, topicId,\n   647\u2192                        numPartitions, getReplicationFactor(firstPartition, reassignment),\n   648\u2192                        config, false);\n   649\u2192                    topicDesc.printDescription();\n   650\u2192                }\n   651\u2192            }\n   652\u2192        }\n   653\u2192\n   654\u2192        public void deleteTopic(TopicCommandOptions opts) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   655\u2192            List<String> topics = getTopics(opts.topic(), opts.excludeInternalTopics());\n   656\u2192            ensureTopicExists(topics, opts.topic(), !opts.ifExists());\n   657\u2192            adminClient.deleteTopics(Collections.unmodifiableList(topics),\n   658\u2192                new DeleteTopicsOptions().retryOnQuotaViolation(false)\n   659\u2192            ).all().get();\n   660\u2192        }\n   661\u2192\n   662\u2192        public List<String> getTopics(Optional<String> topicIncludeList, boolean excludeInternalTopics) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   663\u2192            ListTopicsOptions listTopicsOptions = new ListTopicsOptions();\n   664\u2192            if (!excludeInternalTopics) {\n   665\u2192                listTopicsOptions.listInternal(true);\n   666\u2192            }\n   667\u2192\n   668\u2192            Set<String> allTopics = adminClient.listTopics(listTopicsOptions).names().get();\n   669\u2192            return doGetTopics(allTopics.stream().sorted().collect(Collectors.toList()), topicIncludeList, excludeInternalTopics);\n   670\u2192        }\n   671\u2192\n   672\u2192        public List<Uuid> getTopicIds(Uuid topicIdIncludeList, boolean excludeInternalTopics) throws ExecutionException, InterruptedException {\n   673\u2192            ListTopicsResult allTopics = excludeInternalTopics ? adminClient.listTopics() :\n   674\u2192                adminClient.listTopics(new ListTopicsOptions().listInternal(true));\n   675\u2192            List<Uuid> allTopicIds = allTopics.listings().get().stream()\n   676\u2192                .map(TopicListing::topicId)\n   677\u2192                .sorted()\n   678\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n   679\u2192            return allTopicIds.contains(topicIdIncludeList) ?\n   680\u2192                Collections.singletonList(topicIdIncludeList) :\n   681\u2192                Collections.emptyList();\n   682\u2192        }\n   683\u2192\n   684\u2192        @Override\n   685\u2192        public void close() throws Exception {\n   686\u2192            adminClient.close();\n   687\u2192        }\n   688\u2192    }\n   689\u2192\n   690\u2192    public static final class TopicCommandOptions extends CommandDefaultOptions {\n   691\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> bootstrapServerOpt;\n   692\u2192\n   693\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> commandConfigOpt;\n   694\u2192\n   695\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder listOpt;\n   696\u2192\n   697\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder createOpt;\n   698\u2192\n   699\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder deleteOpt;\n   700\u2192\n   701\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder alterOpt;\n   702\u2192\n   703\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder describeOpt;\n   704\u2192\n   705\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> topicOpt;\n   706\u2192\n   707\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> topicIdOpt;\n   708\u2192\n   709\u2192        private final String nl;\n   710\u2192\n   711\u2192        private static final String KAFKA_CONFIGS_CLI_SUPPORTS_ALTERING_TOPIC_CONFIGS_WITH_A_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER =\n   712\u2192                \" (the kafka-configs CLI supports altering topic configs with a --bootstrap-server option)\";\n   713\u2192\n   714\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> configOpt;\n   715\u2192\n   716\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> deleteConfigOpt;\n   717\u2192\n   718\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<Integer> partitionsOpt;\n   719\u2192\n   720\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<Integer> replicationFactorOpt;\n   721\u2192\n   722\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<String> replicaAssignmentOpt;\n   723\u2192\n   724\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt;\n   725\u2192\n   726\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder reportUnavailablePartitionsOpt;\n   727\u2192\n   728\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder reportUnderMinIsrPartitionsOpt;\n   729\u2192\n   730\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder reportAtMinIsrPartitionsOpt;\n   731\u2192\n   732\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder topicsWithOverridesOpt;\n   733\u2192\n   734\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder ifExistsOpt;\n   735\u2192\n   736\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder ifNotExistsOpt;\n   737\u2192\n   738\u2192        private final OptionSpecBuilder excludeInternalTopicOpt;\n   739\u2192\n   740\u2192        private final ArgumentAcceptingOptionSpec<Integer> partitionSizeLimitPerResponseOpt;\n   741\u2192\n   742\u2192        private final Set<OptionSpec<?>> allTopicLevelOpts;\n   743\u2192\n   744\u2192        private final Set<OptionSpecBuilder> allReplicationReportOpts;\n   745\u2192\n   746\u2192        public TopicCommandOptions(String[] args) {\n   747\u2192            super(args);\n   748\u2192            bootstrapServerOpt = parser.accepts(\"bootstrap-server\", \"REQUIRED: The Kafka server to connect to.\")\n   749\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   750\u2192                .describedAs(\"server to connect to\")\n   751\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   752\u2192            commandConfigOpt = parser.accepts(\"command-config\", \"Property file containing configs to be passed to Admin Client. \" +\n   753\u2192                            \"This is used only with --bootstrap-server option for describing and altering broker configs.\")\n   754\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   755\u2192                .describedAs(\"command config property file\")\n   756\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   757\u2192\n   758\u2192            String kafkaConfigsCanAlterTopicConfigsViaBootstrapServer =\n   759\u2192                    \" (the kafka-configs CLI supports altering topic configs with a --bootstrap-server option)\";\n   760\u2192            listOpt = parser.accepts(\"list\", \"List all available topics.\");\n   761\u2192            createOpt = parser.accepts(\"create\", \"Create a new topic.\");\n   762\u2192            deleteOpt = parser.accepts(\"delete\", \"Delete a topic\");\n   763\u2192            alterOpt = parser.accepts(\"alter\", \"Alter the number of partitions and replica assignment. \" +\n   764\u2192                    \"Update the configuration of an existing topic via --alter is no longer supported here\" +\n   765\u2192                    kafkaConfigsCanAlterTopicConfigsViaBootstrapServer + \".\");\n   766\u2192            describeOpt = parser.accepts(\"describe\", \"List details for the given topics.\");\n   767\u2192            topicOpt = parser.accepts(\"topic\", \"The topic to create, alter, describe or delete. It also accepts a regular \" +\n   768\u2192                            \"expression, except for --create option. Put topic name in double quotes and use the '\\\\' prefix \" +\n   769\u2192                            \"to escape regular expression symbols; e.g. \\\"test\\\\.topic\\\".\")\n   770\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   771\u2192                .describedAs(\"topic\")\n   772\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   773\u2192            topicIdOpt = parser.accepts(\"topic-id\", \"The topic-id to describe.\" +\n   774\u2192                            \"This is used only with --bootstrap-server option for describing topics.\")\n   775\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   776\u2192                .describedAs(\"topic-id\")\n   777\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   778\u2192            nl = System.lineSeparator();\n   779\u2192\n   780\u2192            String logConfigNames = LogConfig.configNames().stream().map(config -> \"\\t\" + config).collect(Collectors.joining(nl));\n   781\u2192            configOpt = parser.accepts(\"config\",  \"A topic configuration override for the topic being created.\" +\n   782\u2192                            \" The following is a list of valid configurations: \" + nl + logConfigNames + nl +\n   783\u2192                            \"See the Kafka documentation for full details on the topic configs.\" +\n   784\u2192                            \" It is supported only in combination with --create if --bootstrap-server option is used\" +\n   785\u2192                            kafkaConfigsCanAlterTopicConfigsViaBootstrapServer + \".\")\n   786\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   787\u2192                .describedAs(\"name=value\")\n   788\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   789\u2192\n   790\u2192            deleteConfigOpt = parser.accepts(\"delete-config\", \"A topic configuration override to be removed for an existing topic (see the list of configurations under the --config option). \" +\n   791\u2192                            \"Not supported with the --bootstrap-server option.\")\n   792\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   793\u2192                .describedAs(\"name\")\n   794\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   795\u2192            partitionsOpt = parser.accepts(\"partitions\", \"The number of partitions for the topic being created or \" +\n   796\u2192                    \"altered (WARNING: If partitions are increased for a topic that has a key, the partition logic or ordering of the messages will be affected). If not supplied for create, defaults to the cluster default.\")\n   797\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   798\u2192                .describedAs(\"# of partitions\")\n   799\u2192                .ofType(java.lang.Integer.class);\n   800\u2192            replicationFactorOpt = parser.accepts(\"replication-factor\", \"The replication factor for each partition in the topic being created. If not supplied, defaults to the cluster default.\")\n   801\u2192                .withRequiredArg()\n   802\u2192                .describedAs(\"replication factor\")\n   803\u2192                .ofType(java.lang.Integer.class);\n   804\u2192            replicaAssignmentOpt = parser.accepts(\"replica-assignment\", \"A list of manual partition-to-broker assignments for the topic being created or altered.\")\n   805\u2192                    .withRequiredArg()\n   806\u2192                    .describedAs(\"broker_id_for_part1_replica1 : broker_id_for_part1_replica2 , \" +\n   807\u2192                            \"broker_id_for_part2_replica1 : broker_id_for_part2_replica2 , ...\")\n   808\u2192                .ofType(String.class);\n   809\u2192            reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt = parser.accepts(\"under-replicated-partitions\",\n   810\u2192                \"if set when describing topics, only show under replicated partitions\");\n   811\u2192            reportUnavailablePartitionsOpt = parser.accepts(\"unavailable-partitions\",\n   812\u2192                \"if set when describing topics, only show partitions whose leader is not available\");\n   813\u2192            reportUnderMinIsrPartitionsOpt = parser.accepts(\"under-min-isr-partitions\",\n   814\u2192                \"if set when describing topics, only show partitions whose isr count is less than the configured minimum.\");\n   815\u2192            reportAtMinIsrPartitionsOpt = parser.accepts(\"at-min-isr-partitions\",\n   816\u2192                \"if set when describing topics, only show partitions whose isr count is equal to the configured minimum.\");\n   817\u2192            topicsWithOverridesOpt = parser.accepts(\"topics-with-overrides\",\n   818\u2192                \"if set when describing topics, only show topics that have overridden configs\");\n   819\u2192            ifExistsOpt = parser.accepts(\"if-exists\",\n   820\u2192                \"if set when altering or deleting or describing topics, the action will only execute if the topic exists.\");\n   821\u2192            ifNotExistsOpt = parser.accepts(\"if-not-exists\",\n   822\u2192                \"if set when creating topics, the action will only execute if the topic does not already exist.\");\n   823\u2192            excludeInternalTopicOpt = parser.accepts(\"exclude-internal\",\n   824\u2192                \"exclude internal topics when running list or describe command. The internal topics will be listed by default\");\n   825\u2192            partitionSizeLimitPerResponseOpt = parser.accepts(\"partition-size-limit-per-response\",\n   826\u2192                \"the maximum partition size to be included in one DescribeTopicPartitions response.\")\n   827\u2192                    .withRequiredArg()\n   828\u2192                    .describedAs(\"maximum number of partitions in one response.\")\n   829\u2192                    .ofType(java.lang.Integer.class);\n   830\u2192            options = parser.parse(args);\n   831\u2192\n   832\u2192            allTopicLevelOpts = new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(alterOpt, createOpt, describeOpt, listOpt, deleteOpt));\n   833\u2192            allReplicationReportOpts = new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt, reportUnderMinIsrPartitionsOpt, reportAtMinIsrPartitionsOpt, reportUnavailablePartitionsOpt));\n   834\u2192\n   835\u2192            checkArgs();\n   836\u2192        }\n   837\u2192\n   838\u2192        public Boolean has(OptionSpec<?> builder) {\n   839\u2192            return options.has(builder);\n   840\u2192        }\n   841\u2192\n   842\u2192        public <A> Optional<A> valueAsOption(OptionSpec<A> option) {\n   843\u2192            return valueAsOption(option, Optional.empty());\n   844\u2192        }\n   845\u2192\n   846\u2192        public <A> Optional<List<A>> valuesAsOption(OptionSpec<A> option) {\n   847\u2192            return valuesAsOption(option, Collections.emptyList());\n   848\u2192        }\n   849\u2192\n   850\u2192        public <A> Optional<A> valueAsOption(OptionSpec<A> option, Optional<A> defaultValue) {\n   851\u2192            if (has(option)) {\n   852\u2192                return Optional.of(options.valueOf(option));\n   853\u2192            } else {\n   854\u2192                return defaultValue;\n   855\u2192            }\n   856\u2192        }\n   857\u2192\n   858\u2192        public <A> Optional<List<A>> valuesAsOption(OptionSpec<A> option, List<A> defaultValue) {\n   859\u2192            return options.has(option) ? Optional.of(options.valuesOf(option)) : Optional.of(defaultValue);\n   860\u2192        }\n   861\u2192\n   862\u2192        public Boolean hasCreateOption() {\n   863\u2192            return has(createOpt);\n   864\u2192        }\n   865\u2192\n   866\u2192        public Boolean hasAlterOption() {\n   867\u2192            return has(alterOpt);\n   868\u2192        }\n   869\u2192\n   870\u2192        public Boolean hasListOption() {\n   871\u2192            return has(listOpt);\n   872\u2192        }\n   873\u2192\n   874\u2192        public Boolean hasDescribeOption() {\n   875\u2192            return has(describeOpt);\n   876\u2192        }\n   877\u2192\n   878\u2192        public Boolean hasDeleteOption() {\n   879\u2192            return has(deleteOpt);\n   880\u2192        }\n   881\u2192\n   882\u2192        public Optional<String> bootstrapServer() {\n   883\u2192            return valueAsOption(bootstrapServerOpt);\n   884\u2192        }\n   885\u2192\n   886\u2192        public Properties commandConfig() throws IOException {\n   887\u2192            if (has(commandConfigOpt)) {\n   888\u2192                return Utils.loadProps(options.valueOf(commandConfigOpt));\n   889\u2192            } else {\n   890\u2192                return new Properties();\n   891\u2192            }\n   892\u2192        }\n   893\u2192\n   894\u2192        public Optional<String> topic() {\n   895\u2192            return valueAsOption(topicOpt);\n   896\u2192        }\n   897\u2192\n   898\u2192        public Optional<String> topicId() {\n   899\u2192            return valueAsOption(topicIdOpt);\n   900\u2192        }\n   901\u2192\n   902\u2192        public Optional<Integer> partitions() {\n   903\u2192            return valueAsOption(partitionsOpt);\n   904\u2192        }\n   905\u2192\n   906\u2192        public Optional<Integer> replicationFactor() {\n   907\u2192            return valueAsOption(replicationFactorOpt);\n   908\u2192        }\n   909\u2192\n   910\u2192        public Optional<Map<Integer, List<Integer>>> replicaAssignment() {\n   911\u2192            if (has(replicaAssignmentOpt) && !Optional.of(options.valueOf(replicaAssignmentOpt)).orElse(\"\").isEmpty())\n   912\u2192                return Optional.of(parseReplicaAssignment(options.valueOf(replicaAssignmentOpt)));\n   913\u2192            else\n   914\u2192                return Optional.empty();\n   915\u2192        }\n   916\u2192\n   917\u2192        public Boolean reportUnderReplicatedPartitions() {\n   918\u2192            return has(reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt);\n   919\u2192        }\n   920\u2192\n   921\u2192        public Boolean reportUnavailablePartitions() {\n   922\u2192            return has(reportUnavailablePartitionsOpt);\n   923\u2192        }\n   924\u2192\n   925\u2192        public Boolean reportUnderMinIsrPartitions() {\n   926\u2192            return has(reportUnderMinIsrPartitionsOpt);\n   927\u2192        }\n   928\u2192\n   929\u2192        public Boolean reportAtMinIsrPartitions() {\n   930\u2192            return has(reportAtMinIsrPartitionsOpt);\n   931\u2192        }\n   932\u2192\n   933\u2192        public Boolean reportOverriddenConfigs() {\n   934\u2192            return has(topicsWithOverridesOpt);\n   935\u2192        }\n   936\u2192\n   937\u2192        public Boolean ifExists() {\n   938\u2192            return has(ifExistsOpt);\n   939\u2192        }\n   940\u2192\n   941\u2192        public Boolean ifNotExists() {\n   942\u2192            return has(ifNotExistsOpt);\n   943\u2192        }\n   944\u2192\n   945\u2192        public Boolean excludeInternalTopics() {\n   946\u2192            return has(excludeInternalTopicOpt);\n   947\u2192        }\n   948\u2192\n   949\u2192        public Optional<Integer> partitionSizeLimitPerResponse() {\n   950\u2192            return valueAsOption(partitionSizeLimitPerResponseOpt);\n   951\u2192        }\n   952\u2192\n   953\u2192        public Optional<List<String>> topicConfig() {\n   954\u2192            return valuesAsOption(configOpt);\n   955\u2192        }\n   956\u2192\n   957\u2192        public void checkArgs() {\n   958\u2192            if (args.length == 0)\n   959\u2192                CommandLineUtils.printUsageAndExit(parser, \"Create, delete, describe, or change a topic.\");\n   960\u2192\n   961\u2192            CommandLineUtils.maybePrintHelpOrVersion(this, \"This tool helps to create, delete, describe, or change a topic.\");\n   962\u2192\n   963\u2192            // should have exactly one action\n   964\u2192            long actions =\n   965\u2192                Arrays.asList(createOpt, listOpt, alterOpt, describeOpt, deleteOpt)\n   966\u2192                    .stream().filter(options::has)\n   967\u2192                    .count();\n   968\u2192            if (actions != 1)\n   969\u2192                CommandLineUtils.printUsageAndExit(parser, \"Command must include exactly one action: --list, --describe, --create, --alter or --delete\");\n   970\u2192\n   971\u2192            checkRequiredArgs();\n   972\u2192            checkInvalidArgs();\n   973\u2192        }\n   974\u2192\n   975\u2192        private void checkRequiredArgs() {\n   976\u2192            // check required args\n   977\u2192            if (!has(bootstrapServerOpt))\n   978\u2192                throw new IllegalArgumentException(\"--bootstrap-server must be specified\");\n   979\u2192            if (has(describeOpt) && has(ifExistsOpt)) {\n   980\u2192                if (!has(topicOpt) && !has(topicIdOpt))\n   981\u2192                    CommandLineUtils.printUsageAndExit(parser, \"--topic or --topic-id is required to describe a topic\");\n   982\u2192                if (has(topicOpt) && has(topicIdOpt))\n   983\u2192                    System.out.println(\"Only topic id will be used when both --topic and --topic-id are specified and topicId is not Uuid.ZERO_UUID\");\n   984\u2192            }\n   985\u2192            if (!has(listOpt) && !has(describeOpt))\n   986\u2192                CommandLineUtils.checkRequiredArgs(parser, options, topicOpt);\n   987\u2192            if (has(alterOpt)) {\n   988\u2192                Set<OptionSpec<?>> usedOptions = new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(bootstrapServerOpt, configOpt));\n   989\u2192                Set<OptionSpec<?>> invalidOptions = new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(alterOpt));\n   990\u2192                CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgsSet(parser, options, usedOptions, invalidOptions, Optional.of(KAFKA_CONFIGS_CLI_SUPPORTS_ALTERING_TOPIC_CONFIGS_WITH_A_BOOTSTRAP_SERVER));\n   991\u2192                CommandLineUtils.checkRequiredArgs(parser, options, partitionsOpt);\n   992\u2192            }\n   993\u2192        }\n   994\u2192\n   995\u2192        private void checkInvalidArgs() {\n   996\u2192            // check invalid args\n   997\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, configOpt, invalidOptions(Arrays.asList(alterOpt, createOpt)));\n   998\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, deleteConfigOpt,\n   999\u2192                invalidOptions(new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList(bootstrapServerOpt)), Arrays.asList(alterOpt)));\n  1000\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, partitionsOpt, invalidOptions(Arrays.asList(alterOpt, createOpt)));\n  1001\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, replicationFactorOpt, invalidOptions(Arrays.asList(createOpt)));\n  1002\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, replicaAssignmentOpt, invalidOptions(Arrays.asList(alterOpt, createOpt)));\n  1003\u2192            if (options.has(createOpt)) {\n  1004\u2192                CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, replicaAssignmentOpt, partitionsOpt, replicationFactorOpt);\n  1005\u2192            }\n  1006\u2192\n  1007\u2192\n  1008\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt,\n  1009\u2192                invalidOptions(Collections.singleton(topicsWithOverridesOpt), Arrays.asList(describeOpt, reportUnderReplicatedPartitionsOpt)));\n  1010\u2192            CommandLineUtils.checkInvalidArgs(parser, options, reportUnderMinIsrPartitionsOpt,\n  1011\u2192                invalidOptions(Collections.singleton(topicsWithOverridesOpt), excludeInternalTopicOpt, invalidOptions(Arrays.asList(listOpt, describeOpt)));\n  1022\u2192        }\n  1023\u2192\n  1024\u2192        private Set<OptionSpec<?>> invalidOptions(List<OptionSpec<?>> removeOptions) {\n  1025\u2192            return invalidOptions(new HashSet<>(), removeOptions);\n  1026\u2192        }\n  1027\u2192\n  1028\u2192        private LinkedHashSet<OptionSpec<?>> invalidOptions(Set<OptionSpec<?>> addOptions, List<OptionSpec<?>> removeOptions) {\n  1029\u2192            LinkedHashSet<OptionSpec<?>> finalOptions = new LinkedHashSet<>(allTopicLevelOpts);\n 30\u2192\n    31\u2192public class CreateTopicsRequest extends AbstractRequest {\n    32\u2192    public static class Builder extends AbstractRequest.Builder<CreateTopicsRequest> {\n    33\u2192 (data.validateOnly() && version == 0)\n    43\u2192                throw new UnsupportedVersionException(\"validateOnly is not supported in version 0 of \" +\n    44\u2192                        \"CreateTopicsRequest\");\n    45\u2192\n    46\u2192            final List<String> topicsWithDefaults = data.topics()\n    47\u2192                .stream()\n    48\u2192                .filter(topic -> topic.assignments().isEmpty())\n    49\u2192                .filter(topic ->\n    50\u2192                    topic.numPartitions() == CreateTopicsRequest.NO_NUM_PARTITIONS\n    51\u2192                        || topic.replicationFactor() == CreateTopicsRequest.NO_REPLICATION_FACTOR)\n    52\u2192                .map(CreatableTopic::name)\n    53\u2192                .collect(Collectors.toList());\n    54\u2192\n    55\u2192            if (!topicsWithDefaults.isEmpty() && version < 4) {\n    56\u2192                throw new UnsupportedVersionException(\"Creating topics with default \"\n    57\u2192                    + \"partitions/replication factor are only supported in CreateTopicRequest \"\n    58\u2192                    + \"version 4+. The following topics need values for partitions and replicas: \"\n    59\u2192                    + topicsWithDefaults);\n    60\u2192            }\n    61\u2192\n    62\u2192            return new CreateTopicsRequest(data, version);\n    63\u2192        }\n    64\u2192\n    65\u2192        @Override\n    66\u2192        public String toString() {\n    67\u2192            return data.toString();\n    68\u2192        }\n    69\u2192\n    70\u2192        @Override\n    71\u2192        public boolean equals(Object other) {\n    72\u2192            return other instanceof Builder && this.data.equals(((Builder) other).data);\n    73\u2192        }\n    74\u2192\n    75\u2192        @Override\n    76\u2192        public int hashCode() {\n    77\u2192            return data.hashCode();\n    78\u2192        }\n    79\u2192    }\n    80\u2192\n    81\u2192    private final CreateTopicsRequestData data;\n    82\u2192\n    83\u2192    public static final int NO_NUM_PARTITIONS = -1;\n    84\u2192    public static final short NO_REPLICATION_FACTOR = -1;\n    85\u2192\n    86\u2192    public CreateTopicsRequest(CreateTopicsRequestData data, short version) throttleTimeMs, Throwable e) {\n    98\u2192        CreateTopicsResponseData response = new CreateTopicsResponseData();\n    99\u2192        if (version() >= 2) {\n   100\u2192            response.setThrottleTimeMs(throttleTimeMs);\n   101\u2192        }\n   102\u2192        ApiError apiError = ApiError.fromThrowable(e);\n   103\u2192        for (CreatableTopic topic : data.topics()) {\n   104\u2192            response.topics().add(new CreatableTopicResult().\n   105\u2192                setName(topic.name()).\n   106\u2192                setErrorCode(apiError.error().code()).\n   107\u2192                setErrorMessage(apiError.message()));\n   108\u2192        }\n   109\u2192        return new CreateTopicsResponse(response);\n   110\u2192    }\n   111\u2192\n   112\u2192 "  2000\u2192  }\n  2001\u2192\n  2002\u2192  def handleCreateTopicsRequest(request: RequestChannel.Request): Unit = {\n  2003\u2192    val zkSupport = metadataSupport.requireZkOrThrow(KafkaApis.shouldAlwaysForward(request))\n  2004\u2192    val controllerMutationQuota = quotas.controllerMutation.newQuotaFor(request, strictSinceVersion = 6)\n  2005\u2192\n  2006\u2192    def sendResponseCallback(results: CreatableTopicResultCollection): Unit = {\n  2007\u2192      val responseData = new CreateTopicsResponseData()\n  2008\u2192        .setTopics(results)\n  2009\u2192      val response = new CreateTopicsResponse(responseData)\n  2010\u2192      trace(s\"Sending create topics response $responseData for correlation id \" +\n  2011\u2192        s\"${request.header.correlationId} to client ${request.header.clientId}.\")\n  2012\u2192      requestHelper.sendResponseMaybeThrottleWithControllerQuota(controllerMutationQuota, request, response)\n  2013\u2192    }\n  2014\u2192\n  2015\u2192    val createTopicsRequest = request.body[CreateTopicsRequest]\n  2016\u2192    val results = new CreatableTopicResultCollection(createTopicsRequest.data.topics.size)\n  2017\u2192    if (!zkSupport.controller.isActive) {\n  2018\u2192      createTopicsRequest.data.topics.forEach { topic =>\n  2019\u2192        results.add(new CreatableTopicResult().setName(topic.name)\n  2020\u2192          .setErrorCode(Errors.NOT_CONTROLLER.code))\n  2021\u2192      }\n  2022\u2192      sendResponseCallback(results)\n  2023\u2192    } else {\n  2024\u2192      createTopicsRequest.data.topics.forEach { topic =>\n  2025\u2192        results.add(new CreatableTopicResult().setName(topic.name))\n  2026\u2192      }\n  2027\u2192      val hasClusterAuthorization = authHelper.authorize(request.context, CREATE, CLUSTER, CLUSTER_NAME,\n  2028\u2192        logIfDenied = false)\n  2029\u2192\n  2030\u2192      val allowedTopicNames = {\n  2031\u2192        val topicNames = createTopicsRequest\n  2032\u2192          .data\n  2033\u2192          .topics\n  2034\u2192          .asScala\n  2035\u2192          .map(_.name)\n  2036\u2192          .toSet\n  2037\u2192\n  2038\u2192          topicNames.diff(Set(Topic.CLUSTER_METADATA_TOPIC_NAME))\n  2039\u2192      }\n  2040\u2192\n  2041\u2192      val authorizedTopics = if (hasClusterAuthorization) {\n  2042\u2192        allowedTopicNames\n  2043\u2192      } else {\n  2044\u2192        authHelper.filterByAuthorized(request.context, CREATE, TOPIC, allowedTopicNames)(identity)\n  2045\u2192      }\n  2046\u2192      val authorizedForDescribeConfigs = authHelper.filterByAuthorized(\n  2047\u2192        request.context,\n  2048\u2192        DESCRIBE_CONFIGS,\n  2049\u2192        TOPIC,\n  2050\u2192        allowedTopicNames,\n  2051\u2192        logIfDenied = false\n  2052\u2192      )(identity).map(name => name -> results.find(name)).toMap\n  2053\u2192\n  2054\u2192      results.forEach { topic =>\n  2055\u2192        if (topic.name() == Topic.CLUSTER_METADATA_TOPIC_NAME) {\n  2056\u2192          topic.setErrorCode(Errors.INVALID_REQUEST.code)\n  2057\u2192          topic.setErrorMessage(s\"Creation of internal topic ${Topic.CLUSTER_METADATA_TOPIC_NAME} is prohibited.\")\n  2058\u2192        } else if (results.findAll(topic.name).size > 1) {\n  2059\u2192          topic.setErrorCode(Errors.INVALID_REQUEST.code)\n  2060\u2192          topic.setErrorMessage(\"Found multiple entries for this topic.\")\n  2061\u2192        } else if (!authorizedTopics.contains(topic.name)) {\n  2062\u2192          topic.setErrorCode(Errors.TOPIC_AUTHORIZATION_FAILED.code)\n  2063\u2192          topic.setErrorMessage(\"Authorization failed.\")\n  2064\u2192        }\n  2065\u2192        if (!authorizedForDescribeConfigs.contains(topic.name) && topic.name() != Topic.CLUSTER_METADATA_TOPIC_NAME) {\n  2066\u2192          topic.setTopicConfigErrorCode(Errors.TOPIC_AUTHORIZATION_FAILED.code)\n  2067\u2192        }\n  2068\u2192      }\n  2069\u2192      val toCreate = mutable.Map[String, CreatableTopic]()\n  2070\u2192      createTopicsRequest.data.topics.forEach { topic =>\n  2071\u2192        if (results.find(topic.name).errorCode == Errors.NONE.code) {\n  2072\u2192          toCreate += topic.name -> topic\n  2073\u2192        }\n  2074\u2192      }\n  2075\u2192      def handleCreateTopicsResults(errors: Map[String, ApiError]): Unit = {\n  2076\u2192        errors.foreach { case (topicName, error) =>\n  2077\u2192          val result = results.find(topicName)\n  2078\u2192          result.setErrorCode(error.error.code)\n  2079\u2192            .setErrorMessage(error.message)\n  2080\u2192          // Reset any configs in the response if Create failed\n  2081\u2192          if (error != ApiError.NONE) {\n  2082\u2192            result.setConfigs(List.empty.asJava)\n  2083\u2192              .setNumPartitions(-1)\n  2084\u2192              .setReplicationFactor(-1)\n  2085\u2192              .setTopicConfigErrorCode(Errors.NONE.code)\n  2086\u2192          }\n  2087\u2192        }\n  2088\u2192        sendResponseCallback(results)\n  2089\u2192      }\n  2090\u2192      zkSupport.adminManager.createTopics(\n  2091\u2192        createTopicsRequest.data.timeoutMs,\n  2092\u2192        createTopicsRequest.data.validateOnly,\n  2093\u2192        toCreate,\n  2094\u2192        authorizedForDescribeConfigs,\n  2095\u2192        controllerMutationQuota,\n  2096\u2192        handleCreateTopicsResults)\n  2097\u2192    }\n  2098\u2192  }\n  2099\u2192\n  2100\u2192  def handleCreatePartitionsRequest(request: RequestChannel.Request): Unit = {\n  2101\u2192    val zkSupport = metadataSupport.requireZkOrThrow(KafkaApis.shouldAlwaysForward(request))\n  2102\u2192    val createPartitionsRequest = request.body[CreatePartitionsRequest]\n  2103\u2192    val controllerMutationQuota = quotas.controllerMutation.newQuotaFor(request, strictSinceVersion = 3)\n  2104\u2192\n  2105\u2192    def sendResponseCallback(results: Map[String, ApiError]): Unit = {\n  2106\u2192      val createPartitionsResults = results.map {\n  2107\u2192        case (topic, error) => new CreatePartitionsTopicResult()\n  2108\u2192          .setName(topic)\n  2109\u2192          .setErrorCode(error.error.code)\n  2110\u2192          .setErrorMessage(error.message)\n  2111\u2192      }.toSeq\n  2112\u2192      val response = new CreatePartitionsResponse(new CreatePartitionsResponseData()\n  2113\u2192        .setResults(createPartitionsResults.asJava))\n  2114\u2192      trace(s\"Sending create partitions response $response for correlation id ${request.header.correlationId} to \" +\n  2115\u2192        s\"client ${request.header.clientId}.\")\n  2116\u2192      requestHelper.sendResponseMaybeThrottleWithControllerQuota(controllerMutationQuota, request, response)\n  2117\u2192    }\n  2118\u2192\n  2119\u2192    if (!zkSupport.controller.isActive) {\n  2120\u2192      val result = createPartitionsRequest.data.topics.asScala.map { topic =>\n  2121\u2192        (topic.name, new ApiError(Errors.NOT_CONTROLLER, null))\n  2122\u2192      }.toMap\n  2123\u2192      sendResponseCallback(result)\n  2124\u2192    } else {\n  2125\u2192      // Special handling to add duplicate topics to the response\n  2126\u2192      val topics = createPartitionsRequest.data.topics.asScala.toSeq\n  2127\u2192      val dupes = topics.groupBy(_.name)\n  2128\u2192        .filter { _._2.size > 1 }\n  2129\u2192        .keySet\n  2130\u2192      val notDuped = topics.filterNot(topic => dupes.contains(topic.name))\n  2131\u2192      val (authorized, unauthorized) = authHelper.partitionSeqByAuthorized(request.context, ALTER, TOPIC,\n  2132\u2192        notDuped)(_.name)\n  2133\u2192\n  2134\u2192      val (queuedForDeletion, valid) = authorized.partition { topic =>\n  2135\u2192        zkSupport.controller.isTopicQueuedForDeletion(topic.name)\n  2136\u2192      }\n  2137\u2192\n  2138\u2192      val errors = dupes.map(_ -> new ApiError(Errors.INVALID_REQUEST, \"Duplicate topic in request.\")) ++\n  2139\u2192        unauthorized.map(_.name -> new ApiError(Errors.TOPIC_AUTHORIZATION_FAILED, \"The topic authorization is failed.\")) ++\n  2140\u2192        queuedForDeletion.map(_.name -> new ApiError(Errors.INVALID_TOPIC_EXCEPTION, \"The topic is queued for deletion.\"))\n  2141\u2192\n  2142\u2192      zkSupport.adminManager.createPartitions(\n  2143\u2192        createPartitionsRequest.data.timeoutMs,\n  2144\u2192        valid,\n  2145\u2192        createPartitionsRequest.data.validateOnly,\n  2146\u2192        controllerMutationQuota,\n  2147\u2192        result => sendResponseCallback(result ++ errors))\n  2148\u2192    }\n  2149\u2192  }\n\n<system-reminder>\nWhenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. You CAN and SHOULD provide analysis of malware, what it is doing. But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.\n</system-reminder>\n"
